title: Custom status options by user
excerpt: Allow each user to define a custom set of statuses (colors & names) for each board they create.  The status column can remain this custom option or be edited to suit the need of the board.

posts.author: JkP (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow each user to define a custom set of statuses (colors & names) for each board they create. The status column can remain this custom option or be edited to suit the need of the board.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JkP - you can create Column Templates however this is only available on the Enterprise tier.

Thanks!
Mark
